Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` and `go test ./...` pass locally
- [ ] `gofmt` clean and `go vet` clean
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] No placeholder code, silenced errors, or disabled tests
- [ ] Does **not** add an agent-callable path to approve / reject / mark done
- [ ] Updated docs (`docs/`) if behavior or a contract changed
